item.title: Exposure to air pollution is associated with increased risk of developing limitations in physical function
item.description: 1. Greater long-term exposure to particulate matter (PM) and nitrogen dioxide (NO2) was associated with increased risk of progressing from no disabili...

item.title: One in Six Medicare Beneficiaries Use Telehealth for Essential Care

item.description: 1. Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists (GLP-1RA) in combination with progestins are significantly more effective at reducing endometrial cancer ...

item.title: Deep-learning models displayed expert-level accuracy in detecting epileptiform discharges on electroencephalogram (EEG) recordings
item.description: 1. Li and colleagues developed a deep-learning model to analyze EEG recordings and detect event-level EEG spikes. 2. The model achieved high accuracy ...
